description: Hybrid father athlete training system — strength, athleticism, aesthetics, longevity

phases.name: Phase 1 — Work Capacity & Hypertrophy
phases.goal: Build muscle, improve work capacity, develop aerobic base, establish structural balance

mesocycles.rotation_notes: Bench Press / Back Squat / RDL / Weighted Pullups / Single-Arm DB Row

exercises.name: Med Ball Chest Pass
exercises.notes: Explosive chest pass against wall. Maximum velocity. Full reset between reps.

exercises.name: Band Pull-Apart
exercises.notes: Scapular activation. Squeeze shoulder blades at end range.

exercises.name: Barbell Bench Press
exercises.notes: 70-75%. Drive feet into floor. Full range of motion. Retract scaps.

exercises.name: Weighted Pull-ups
exercises.notes: Add weight via belt or DB. Full dead hang each rep. Squeeze lats.

exercises.name: Incline DB Press
exercises.notes: 30-degree incline. Full stretch at bottom.

exercises.name: Single-Arm DB Row
exercises.notes: Knee on bench. Pull to hip. Squeeze lat at top.

exercises.name: Cable Fly
exercises.notes: High-to-low. Squeeze chest. Constant tension.

exercises.name: Lat Pulldown
exercises.notes: Shoulder-width grip. Pull to upper chest.

exercises.name: DB Lateral Raise
exercises.notes: Slight forward lean. Lead with pinky.

exercises.name: Face Pull
exercises.notes: Rope to forehead. External rotate at end. Constant tension.

exercises.name: Box Jump
exercises.notes: Step off box. Explosive hip extension. Full reset.

exercises.name: Banded Monster Walk
exercises.notes: Mini band above knees. Quarter squat position.

exercises.name: Back Squat
exercises.notes: 70-75%. Break at hips and knees together. Full depth. Brace hard.

exercises.name: Romanian Deadlift
exercises.notes: Hinge at hips. Deep hamstring stretch. Slight knee bend.

exercises.name: Leg Press
exercises.notes: Full depth. Controlled eccentric. No lockout.

exercises.name: Lying Leg Curl
exercises.notes: Squeeze hamstrings at top. Slow eccentric.

exercises.name: Walking Lunge
exercises.notes: Long stride. Upright torso. Control each step.

exercises.name: Standing Calf Raise
exercises.notes: Full stretch bottom. 2-sec pause at top.

exercises.name: Reverse Pec Deck
exercises.notes: Rear delt frequency on lower day. Full squeeze.

exercises.name: Zone 2 Cardio
exercises.notes: Row, bike, or incline walk. HR 120-140 bpm. Conversational pace.

exercises.name: Hanging Leg Raise
exercises.notes: Control the swing. Raise to 90 degrees. Slow negative.

exercises.name: Pallof Press
exercises.notes: Anti-rotation. Press and hold 2 seconds. Both sides.

exercises.name: Farmer Carry
exercises.notes: Heavy DBs or KBs. Tall posture. Brace core.

exercises.name: EZ Bar Curl
exercises.notes: Strict form. No swing. Full range. Squeeze at top.

exercises.name: Overhead Tricep Extension
exercises.notes: Cable or DB. Deep stretch. Full lockout.

exercises.name: Hammer Curl
exercises.notes: Neutral grip. Alternate arms. No swing.

exercises.name: Cable External Rotation
exercises.notes: Elbow pinned at side. Slow controlled rotation.

exercises.name: DB Push Press
exercises.notes: Explosive press. Use legs to initiate. Control negative.

exercises.name: Band Face Pull
exercises.notes: High pull. External rotate and squeeze.

exercises.name: Overhead Press
exercises.notes: Strict press. No leg drive. Full lockout.

exercises.name: Barbell Row
exercises.notes: Overhand grip. Pull to belly button. No momentum.

exercises.name: Landmine Press
exercises.notes: Staggered stance. Core braced. Each arm.

exercises.name: Seated Cable Row
exercises.notes: V-bar handle. Pull to belly. Squeeze.

exercises.name: Cable Lateral Raise
exercises.notes: Behind body start. Slight lean. Constant tension.

exercises.name: Reverse Pec Deck
exercises.notes: Full contraction. Slow negative.

exercises.name: Incline DB Curl
exercises.notes: 45-degree bench. Full stretch at bottom.

exercises.name: Cable Pushdown
exercises.notes: Elbows pinned. Full lockout. Constant tension.

exercises.name: Kettlebell Swing
exercises.notes: Russian-style. Hip snap. Arms are hooks.

exercises.name: Goblet Squat
exercises.notes: Activation. Elbows between knees. Upright torso.

exercises.name: Trap Bar Deadlift
exercises.notes: Neutral grip. Drive through midfoot. Hips and shoulders rise together.

exercises.name: Hack Squat
exercises.notes: Full depth. Controlled eccentric.

exercises.name: Seated Leg Curl
exercises.notes: Squeeze hamstrings at top. Slow eccentric.

exercises.name: Bulgarian Split Squat
exercises.notes: Rear foot elevated. Vertical shin. Deep stretch.

exercises.name: Hip Thrust
exercises.notes: Drive through heels. Squeeze glutes at lockout.

exercises.name: Seated Calf Raise
exercises.notes: Deep stretch at bottom. Slow eccentric.

exercises.name: DB Lateral Raise
exercises.notes: Shoulder frequency. Light weight. No momentum.

mesocycles.rotation_notes: Incline Barbell / Front Squat / Good Morning / Chin-ups / Chest Supported Row

exercises.name: Med Ball Slam
exercises.notes: Overhead slam. Maximum force into ground.

exercises.name: Scap Push-Up
exercises.notes: Protract and retract shoulder blades. Maintain plank.

exercises.name: Incline Barbell Press
exercises.notes: 30-degree incline. 70-75%. Full ROM. Retract scaps.

exercises.name: Chin-ups
exercises.notes: Supinated grip. Full hang. Squeeze biceps and lats.

exercises.name: Flat DB Press
exercises.notes: Full stretch at bottom. Controlled press.

exercises.name: Chest Supported Row
exercises.notes: Incline bench. Pull to ribcage. No momentum.

exercises.name: Machine Chest Press
exercises.notes: Full stretch. Squeeze chest at peak.

exercises.name: Cable Pullover
exercises.notes: Keep arms slightly bent. Pull to hips. Squeeze lats.

exercises.name: Cable Lateral Raise
exercises.notes: Behind body start. Constant tension.

exercises.name: Band Pull-Apart
exercises.notes: High reps. Squeeze rear delts.

exercises.name: Broad Jump
exercises.notes: Explosive hip extension. Swing arms. Stick landing.

exercises.name: Banded Glute Bridge
exercises.notes: Band above knees. Squeeze hard at top.

exercises.name: Front Squat
exercises.notes: Clean or cross grip. 70-75%. Elbows high. Full depth.

exercises.name: Good Morning
exercises.notes: Barbell on traps. Slight knee bend. Deep hinge.

exercises.name: Leg Extension
exercises.notes: Slow eccentric. Full contraction at top.

exercises.name: Nordic Curl (eccentric)
exercises.notes: Lower as slowly as possible. Hands to push up.

exercises.name: Reverse Lunge
exercises.notes: Step back. Vertical shin front leg.

exercises.name: Seated Calf Raise
exercises.notes: Deep stretch bottom. Pause at top.

exercises.name: Reverse Pec Deck
exercises.notes: Rear delt frequency. Full contraction.

exercises.name: Zone 2 Cardio
exercises.notes: Row, bike, or incline walk. HR 120-140 bpm.

exercises.name: Dead Bug
exercises.notes: Opposite arm/leg. Press low back into floor.

exercises.name: Cable Woodchop
exercises.notes: Rotate through hips. Core resists. Each side.

exercises.name: Suitcase Carry
exercises.notes: Heavy single DB/KB. Stay upright. Don't lean.

exercises.name: Hammer Curl
exercises.notes: Neutral grip. Alternate arms. No swing.

exercises.name: Dip
exercises.notes: Parallel bars. Slight lean forward. Full lockout.

exercises.name: Incline DB Curl
exercises.notes: 45-degree bench. Full stretch. Strict.

exercises.name: Cable External Rotation
exercises.notes: Elbow pinned. Slow controlled rotation.

exercises.name: Push Press
exercises.notes: Dip-drive-press. Use legs to initiate.

exercises.name: Band Dislocate
exercises.notes: Wide grip band pull-over. Slow controlled.

exercises.name: DB Shoulder Press
exercises.notes: Seated. Full lockout. Controlled negative.

exercises.name: Single-Arm DB Row
exercises.notes: Pull to hip. Squeeze lat at top. Each arm.

exercises.name: Machine Chest Press
exercises.notes: Full stretch. Press volume.

exercises.name: Chest Supported Row
exercises.notes: Pull to ribcage. No momentum.

exercises.name: DB Lateral Raise
exercises.notes: Slight forward lean. No momentum.

exercises.name: Cable Face Pull
exercises.notes: External rotate at end. Rear delt + scap.

exercises.name: Preacher Curl
exercises.notes: Full stretch at bottom. Strict.

exercises.name: Overhead Tricep Extension
exercises.notes: Cable or DB. Deep stretch.

exercises.name: Trap 3 Raise
exercises.notes: Prone on incline. Thumbs up. Scapular stability.

exercises.name: Hang Power Clean
exercises.notes: Hip-driven. Aggressive extension. Catch in quarter squat.

exercises.name: Romanian Deadlift
exercises.notes: Hinge at hips. Deep hamstring stretch. Barbell.

exercises.name: Leg Press
exercises.notes: Full depth. Controlled negative. No lockout.

exercises.name: Lying Leg Curl
exercises.notes: Squeeze hamstrings. Slow eccentric.

exercises.name: Step-Up
exercises.notes: High box. Drive through lead leg. No push from back.

exercises.name: Cable Pull-Through
exercises.notes: Rope between legs. Hip hinge. Squeeze glutes.

exercises.name: Standing Calf Raise
exercises.notes: Full stretch. Pause at top.

exercises.name: Machine Lateral Raise
exercises.notes: Shoulder frequency. Controlled.

mesocycles.rotation_notes: Close-Grip Bench / Safety Bar Squat / Sumo DL / Pull-ups / Pendlay Row

exercises.name: Plyo Push-up
exercises.notes: Explosive. Hands leave ground. Full reset.

exercises.name: Prone Y Raise
exercises.notes: Face down on incline. Thumbs up. Scapular stability.

exercises.name: Close-Grip Bench Press
exercises.notes: Hands inside shoulder width. 70-75%. Tricep emphasis.

exercises.name: Pull-ups
exercises.notes: Pronated grip. Full hang. Chin over bar.

exercises.name: Landmine Press
exercises.notes: Staggered stance. Core braced.

exercises.name: Seal Row
exercises.notes: Prone on bench. Pull to chest. Full squeeze.

exercises.name: Pec Deck
exercises.notes: Full stretch. Squeeze at peak.

exercises.name: Straight-Arm Pulldown
exercises.notes: Keep arms straight. Pull to hips. Squeeze lats.

exercises.name: Plate Lateral Raise
exercises.notes: Neutral grip on plate edges. Strict.

exercises.name: Face Pull
exercises.notes: Rope to forehead. External rotate.

exercises.name: Depth Jump
exercises.notes: Step off box. Immediately jump max height. Minimal ground contact.

exercises.name: Safety Bar Squat
exercises.notes: SSB. 70-75%. High bar position. Drive through midfoot.

exercises.name: Sumo Deadlift
exercises.notes: Wide stance. Push floor away. Glute lockout.

exercises.name: Hack Squat
exercises.notes: Full depth. Controlled eccentric. Quad focus.

exercises.name: Seated Leg Curl
exercises.notes: Squeeze at top. Slow eccentric.

exercises.name: Goblet Squat
exercises.notes: Deep squat. Elbows between knees. Upright torso.

exercises.name: Leg Press Calf Raise
exercises.notes: Full ROM. Pause at stretch. Controlled.

exercises.name: Zone 2 Cardio
exercises.notes: Row, bike, or incline walk. HR 120-140 bpm.

exercises.name: Hanging Leg Raise
exercises.notes: Control the swing. Raise to 90 degrees.

exercises.name: Landmine Rotation
exercises.notes: Rotate through hips. Controlled arc.

exercises.name: Overhead Carry
exercises.notes: Single KB or DB overhead. Tall posture. Each arm.

exercises.name: Cable Curl
exercises.notes: Full stretch. Squeeze at top.

exercises.name: Skull Crusher
exercises.notes: EZ bar or DBs. Deep stretch. Full lockout.

exercises.name: Reverse Curl
exercises.notes: Pronated grip. Forearm and brachialis emphasis.

exercises.name: Wall Slides
exercises.notes: Back against wall. Slide arms up. Maintain contact.

exercises.name: Landmine Push Press
exercises.notes: Explosive. Drive through legs. Each arm.

exercises.name: Band Pull-Apart
exercises.notes: Scapular retraction. Squeeze at end.

exercises.name: Seated DB Press
exercises.notes: Seated. No back support preferred. Full lockout.

exercises.name: Pendlay Row
exercises.notes: Dead stop each rep. Explosive pull to sternum.

exercises.name: Incline Machine Press
exercises.notes: Upper chest volume. Full stretch.

exercises.name: Cable Row
exercises.notes: V-bar handle. Pull to belly button.

exercises.name: Machine Lateral Raise
exercises.notes: Full ROM. Constant tension.

exercises.name: Rear Delt Fly
exercises.notes: DB or cable. Full contraction.

exercises.name: Spider Curl
exercises.notes: Incline bench face down. Short head emphasis.

exercises.name: Rope Pushdown
exercises.notes: Spread rope at bottom. Full lockout.

exercises.name: Power Clean
exercises.notes: Full clean from floor. Aggressive triple extension.

exercises.name: Rack Pull
exercises.notes: From knee height. Lockout power. Overload stimulus.

exercises.name: Leg Extension
exercises.notes: Full contraction. Controlled eccentric.

exercises.name: GHR
exercises.notes: Glute-ham raise. Control eccentric. Full extension.

exercises.name: Walking Lunge
exercises.notes: DB in each hand. Long stride. Upright torso.

exercises.name: Barbell Hip Thrust
exercises.notes: Heavy. Drive through heels. Squeeze glutes.

exercises.name: Standing Calf Raise
exercises.notes: Full ROM. Pause at top.

exercises.name: Cable Lateral Raise
exercises.notes: Shoulder frequency. Behind body start.

phases.name: Phase 2 — Strength & Power
phases.goal: Increase maximal strength, develop explosive power, improve neural efficiency

mesocycles.rotation_notes: Bench Press / Back Squat / Trap Bar DL / Weighted Pullups / Barbell Row

exercises.name: Med Ball Chest Pass
exercises.notes: Maximum velocity. Full reset between reps.

exercises.name: Band Pull-Apart
exercises.notes: Scapular activation before heavy pressing.

exercises.name: Barbell Bench Press
exercises.notes: Heavy. 80-85%. Drive feet into floor. Retract scaps. Full ROM.

exercises.name: Weighted Pull-ups
exercises.notes: Heavy. Full dead hang. Squeeze at top.

exercises.name: Incline DB Press
exercises.notes: 30-degree. Full stretch at bottom.

exercises.name: Chest Supported Row
exercises.notes: Pull to ribcage. No momentum.

exercises.notes: Chest isolation. Constant tension.

exercises.name: Lat Pulldown
exercises.notes: Wide grip. Pull to upper chest.

exercises.name: DB Lateral Raise
exercises.notes: Slight lean. Lead with elbows.

exercises.name: Face Pull
exercises.notes: Rope to forehead. External rotate.

exercises.name: Box Jump
exercises.notes: Explosive. Step down. Full reset. Increase height weekly.

exercises.name: Back Squat
exercises.notes: Heavy. 80-85%. Full depth. Brace hard.

exercises.name: Romanian Deadlift
exercises.notes: Hinge at hips. Deep hamstring stretch.

exercises.name: Lying Leg Curl
exercises.notes: Squeeze at top. Controlled negative.

exercises.name: Walking Lunge
exercises.notes: Unilateral strength. Upright torso.

exercises.name: Standing Calf Raise
exercises.notes: Full stretch. 2-sec pause at top.

exercises.name: Zone 2 Cardio
exercises.notes: Row, bike, or incline walk. HR 120-140 bpm. Maintain aerobic base.

exercises.name: Ab Wheel
exercises.notes: Full extension if able. Control return.
